# Cloud sync client workflow through real CLI with a fake backend URL.
exec pinax init vault --title Vault --json
stdout '"command":"vault.init"'

! exec pinax cloud status --vault vault --json
stdout '"code":"cloud_not_configured"'

exec pinax cloud login --endpoint $PINAX_FAKE_CLOUD_URL --workspace ws_123 --device dev_laptop --secret-ref env://PINAX_CLOUD_TOKEN --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"cloud.login"'
stdout '"status":"success"'
! stdout 'PINAX_CLOUD_TOKEN'
! stdout 'Authorization'

exec pinax cloud status --vault vault --agent
stdout 'command=cloud.status'
stdout 'status=success'
stdout 'fact.configured=true'
stdout 'fact.session_status=active'
! stdout 'PINAX_CLOUD_TOKEN'

exec pinax cloud doctor --vault vault --events
stdout '"type":"start"'
stdout '"type":"end"'
stdout '"command":"cloud.doctor"'
! stdout 'PINAX_CLOUD_TOKEN'

exec pinax sync diff --target cloud --dry-run --base-revision rev_1 --remote-revision rev_1 --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"sync.diff"'
stdout 'upload_blob'
stdout '"dry_run":"true"'
stdout '"remote_write":"false"'

exec pinax sync push --target cloud --dry-run --base-revision rev_1 --remote-revision rev_1 --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"sync.push"'
stdout 'upload_manifest'
stdout '"remote_write":"false"'

exec pinax sync push --target cloud --yes --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"sync.push"'
stdout '"status":"success"'
stdout '"remote_write":true'
! stdout 'cloud_api_unimplemented'
! stdout 'redaction-sentinel-body'

exec pinax sync pull --target cloud --dry-run --base-revision rev_1 --remote-revision rev_1 --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"sync.pull"'
stdout 'download_manifest'

! exec pinax sync push --target cloud --yes --base-revision rev_1 --remote-revision rev_2 --vault vault --json
stdout '"code":"REVISION_CONFLICT"'
stdout 'manual_review'


# Rclone/OneDrive is configurable but not allowed to silently claim a remote write until the adapter and lock-object commit path are wired.
exec pinax cloud backend set rclone --remote onedrive:PinaxSync --workspace ws_123 --device dev_laptop --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"cloud.backend.set"'
stdout '"backend_kind":"rclone-direct"'
! stdout 'refresh_token'
! stdout 'Authorization'

exec pinax cloud doctor --vault vault --json
stdout '"auth_boundary":"provider_credentials"'
stdout '"server_audit":false'

! exec pinax sync push --target cloud --yes --base-revision rev_1 --remote-revision rev_1 --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"sync.push"'
stdout '"status":"failed"'
stdout '"code":"transport_unavailable"'
stdout '"remote_write":false'
! stdout 'cloud_api_unimplemented'
! stdout 'NOTICE:'
! stdout 'CRITICAL:'
! stdout 'rclone copyto failed'
! stdout '"remote_write":true'
! stdout 'redaction-sentinel-body'
-- vault/notes/alpha.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_alpha
title: Alpha
kind: reference
---

# Alpha

redaction-sentinel-body
